{{Quote|Keep valuables secure while at the Elcor Station.|Loudspeaker|<ref name="Star Wars: Obi-Wan">[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']]</ref>}}
'''Elcor Station''' was a [[Hovertrain/Legends|hovertrain]] station operating in the lower sectors of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

Shortly before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was [[Skirmishes on Coruscant|sent]] to the sector containing Elcor Station to get information regarding the [[Black Heth]], a street gang. Kenobi managed to track one of the gang's [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Unidentified Trandoshan (Black Heth)|leaders]] to Elcor Station. The two dueled on top of a hovertrain that was supposed to be leaving, but was blocked by large pieces of metal debris.

After facing several Black Heth thugs and [[Death/Legends|defeating]] their leader, Kenobi cleared the debris using a [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force push]], boarded the hovertrain, and left the sector.

==Behind the scenes==
Elcor Station first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan'']].
